class.description: A* grid planner that delegates to texnitis_nav_core::AStarPlanner. Subscribes /map (or `<name>.map_topic`) via the shared MapProvider, converts OccupancyGrid to GridMapView zero-copy, and emits a path in the configured global frame.

Height-aware A* grid planner. Subscribes /map and /height_grid via MapProvider / HeightMapProvider. Cells whose height value meets `<name>.height_lethal_threshold` are merged into the occupancy grid as occupied before A* runs. Returns NotInitialized when the height topic has not delivered yet and `require_height_grid` is true (the default).
